title: BLOCK 1 FINAL: Alphabet mastery test
description: Closing test for Block 1 — full alphabet, sentences, 25 WPM target
text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog and watches the river flow under a wide blue sky

tips.text: This is the closing test for the block. The old fox carries every one of the twenty-six letters, and the line that follows asks for all of them again. Type it like proof.
Clear this line and the alphabet is yours. From here on there is no English sentence you cannot set down.

tips.target: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog

tips.text: The mark is twenty-five words a minute with fewer than seven slips. Hold your pace; do not chase the number.

tips.target: and watches the river flow under a wide blue sky

character_tips.anna: This is the test that closes the block. Pass it and the alphabet belongs to you. Punctuation is the next desk over. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: End of the first block. Any English word will go under your hands now. Next we add the marks that turn words into proper copy. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: One clean line stands between you and the next block. Keep your rhythm and walk through it. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: The last test of the block, and you have earned your way to it. Steady hands, clear head. You can do this. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
